compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement template registry parser script
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/scripts/parse-template-registry.sh` to make Task 1 RED tests GREEN.

### Implementation
- Accept registry file path as argument (default: `plugins/dso/config/template-registry.yaml`)
- Parse YAML using embedded Python (same pattern as read-config.sh parse_simple_yaml) — NEVER shell-source
- Validate required fields per entry: name, repo_url (full HTTPS), install_method, framework_type
- Allowlist install_method to exactly {nava-platform, git-clone} — reject unknown values with stderr error
- Detect unknown keys per entry — emit warning to stderr (catches typos like instal_method)
- Output: one line per valid template, tab-separated: name\trepo_url\tinstall_method\tframework_type\tdata_flags
- data_flags column: required_data_flags list serialized as comma-joined string; empty list outputs empty string
- On missing file: exit 0, empty stdout, warning to stderr
- On malformed YAML: exit 0, empty stdout, warning to stderr
- On validation failure (missing field, bad install_method): exit 1, stderr error

### File Impact
- CREATE: `plugins/dso/scripts/parse-template-registry.sh`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/parse-template-registry.sh
- [ ] Script syntax valid
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/parse-template-registry.sh
- [ ] RED tests now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-parse-template-registry.sh
- [ ] Script never shell-sources non-lib files
  Verify: ! grep -Ev 'hooks/lib' plugins/dso/scripts/parse-template-registry.sh | grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*(source|\.)\s'

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (RED tests already exist) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: parser implemented — 19/19 tests GREEN, unified yaml.safe_load parser.
